## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and approach for RepStack, balancing SEO-driven articles with thought leadership pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hybrid approach agreed: Continue SEO-focused articles (5/week) while developing in-depth "masterpiece" content](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [17 clicks generated so far from existing articles; focus on showcasing traffic growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Plan to create pillar topics, linking to SEO articles; aim to convince client to restore hidden content](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Emphasis on balancing client education with assertive strategy recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Performance

  - [17 clicks generated from existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Top performing topics: AI consulting, healthcare, data-driven AI](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Hidden articles limiting potential traffic contribution](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Hybrid approach:](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
    1.  Continue SEO-focused articles (5/week cadence) to build traffic
    2.  Develop in-depth "masterpiece" content for thought leadership (2-3 pieces/week)
  - [Narrative: Demonstrate expertise in traffic generation, then enrich high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Goal: Balance client's desire for editorial content with proven SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### Masterpiece Content Development

  - [Andrej prepared draft with placeholder images and comments for custom infographics](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Focus on breaking up text, avoiding jargon, and creating visually appealing layout](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Post-editing process to refine language, remove AI-like phrases, and ensure natural flow](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Client Communication Strategy

  - [Present two-pronged approach: SEO-driven traffic building + thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Emphasize traffic potential to justify SEO content alongside editorial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Leverage existing client trust to assertively recommend proven strategies](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### SEO Content Restoration

  - [Plan to convince client to restore hidden SEO articles once satisfied with new approach](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Highlight interconnectedness of SEO content and thought leadership pieces for overall strategy](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to join next client meeting, emphasizing hybrid approach benefits](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Andrej to refine masterpiece content draft, focusing on natural language and visual elements](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Prepare presentation of traffic metrics to showcase potential of SEO-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Develop 2-3 in-depth "masterpiece" articles per week alongside SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Create pillar topics and link to existing SEO articles to demonstrate cohesive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/DRxyFBi-ienqDZn3_P2sy87Zvvz-s4Z3?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
